
---
title: "Manuscripts"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
---




```{r warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}


library(RefManageR)
library(tidyverse)

refs <- ReadBib("data/VH library.bib")
refs <- refs[!is.na(refs$journal)]

df_clean <-
  as_tibble(as.data.frame(refs)) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(year),

    authors = map_chr(author, ~ paste(.x, collapse = ", ")),
    authors = str_replace_all(authors, " and ", ", "),
    authors = str_replace_all(authors, "Vagish Hemmige", "**Vagish Hemmige**"),

    title = str_replace_all(title, "\\{|\\}", ""),

    citation = str_c(
      authors, ". ",
      str_remove(title, "\\.$"), ". ",
      "*", journal, "* ",
      year,
      if_else(!is.na(volume), str_c(";", volume), ""),
      if_else(!is.na(number), str_c("(", number, ")"), ""),
      if_else(!is.na(pages), str_c(":", pages), ""),
      ".",
      if_else(!is.na(doi), str_c(" https://doi.org/", doi), "")
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(year))

```


```{r results='asis'}


df_clean %>%
  arrange(desc(year)) %>%
  group_split(year) %>%
  walk(function(d) {
    cat("\n\n## ", d$year[1], "\n\n", sep = "")
    cat(paste(d$citation, collapse = "\n\n"))
    cat("\n\n")
  })



```
